description_long: This object is a classic, vintage-style telescope mounted on a wooden tripod stand. The telescope tube is elongated and conical, with a wider objective lens at the front and a narrower eyepiece at the back, both encircled by black metal rings. The tripod consists of three slender, tapered wooden legs, each attached to a central circular mounting plate that supports the telescope. The legs are evenly spaced and slightly splayed for stability, with a small central brace beneath the mounting plate. The telescope is finished in a warm brown color with black accents, giving it an antique appearance. The overall design suggests it is intended for decorative or observational use in an urban or office setting.
description: A vintage-style brown telescope with black accents mounted on a wooden tripod stand, featuring three slender legs and a conical tube.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the brown telescope tube and all three tripod legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large circular objective lens and the symmetrical arrangement of the tripod legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the telescope's tapered tube and the tripod's structure from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the narrow eyepiece and the alignment of the tripod legs beneath the mounting plate.
